name: media-upload
summary: Pick/capture an image and upload to a private Supabase Storage bucket with per-user folders + signed URLs.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_media.sql (creates the private 'user-media' bucket + per-user folder RLS)
Add the photo-library usage string to app.config.ts ios.infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription (tailored) — store-readiness requires it
Files are private: read them back with short-lived signed URLs (createSignedUrl), never public URLs
Replace src/features/media/ui/media-upload-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
